nasb.text: For it seems absurd to me in sending a prisoner, not to indicate also the charges against him.”

esv.text: For it seems to me unreasonable, in sending a prisoner, not to indicate the charges against him.”

cnv.text: 因為我認為解送囚犯，不指明他的罪狀，是不合理的。”

ccb.text: 因为在我看来，解送犯人却不奏明罪状不合情理。”

csbs.text: 因为我认为，解送囚犯而不指明对他的罪状，是没有道理的。”
